conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
I have been really down lately. It’s been a few weeks, and I just can’t seem to shake the feeling that I should be doing better by now.
Has that feeling of being down affected your sleep at all?
Yeah, it has. I wake up in the middle of the night and just lie there thinking about all the things I could have done differently.
When you're lying awake at night thinking about those things, does it make it harder to find the motivation to do things you normally enjoy during the day?
Yeah, it does. I just don't have the energy to do much of anything. I feel like I'm just going through the motions right now.
You mentioned thinking about things you could have done differently—does that leave you feeling disappointed in yourself?
Definitely. I keep replaying it in my head, and I just feel like I failed. It’s hard to see myself as anything other than a failure right now.
You mentioned that things feel pointless - when did that start feeling this strong?
It started a few months ago. I used to love my job, but now I just feel like I'm just ticking boxes.
When you're just ticking boxes at work, does it feel harder to focus on the tasks themselves?
Yeah, it does. I just can’t seem to concentrate on anything because I’m too busy thinking about how I used to be better.
When you're feeling this way, do you find yourself getting more easily frustrated or on edge with people around you?
Yeah, I do. I just get annoyed with everyone, even the people I used to get along with.
When you're feeling annoyed with people, does that make you want to pull away from them?
Yeah, it does. I just don't want to deal with anyone right now. I just want to be left alone.
When you say nothing matters, what parts of life feel most empty lately?
Everything. I used to have a goal, but now I just don't see the point in trying.
How do you see the next few weeks unfolding for you?
I don't know. I just don't see a way out of this. I feel stuck, and I don't know how to make it stop.
How much of this feels like giving up versus feeling exhausted?
It's mostly exhaustion. I don't want to give up, but I just can't see how I can keep going like this.
